primary_post.text:
New episode: How small teams build a reliable podcast production pipeline.

Consultant @maya_chen breaks down the five stages—capture, post, extraction, review, distribution—and why "the pipeline is the product." We talk raw vs cleaned transcripts, where automation helps, and how to keep metadata in sync.

Listen + checklist: https://creators.example.com/checklists/podcast-release

secondary_posts.text:
"A transcript is a rich input, not the final source of editorial truth."

In Episode 14, @maya_chen joins us to talk about building a podcast production pipeline that small teams can actually trust—without over-automating approvals.

If your title, description, transcript, and chapters don’t agree, listeners feel it immediately.

Episode 14 is a practical walkthrough of how to keep your metadata aligned from raw recording to publish.
